Off Calendar Mar-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. William Gordon, Esq. represented Plaintiff Fausto Santos and who was sworn and examined by the Court. The Court having received evidence grants judgment as follows: Principal: $77,345,26; Costs: 251.00; Fees: $8,300.00 for a total judgment of $85,896.26. Judgment signed in open court.
